generated_oml:
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Swing angle encoder for measuring hoist swinging motion"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Anemometer for measuring wind speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance CartPositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Encoder for measuring cart position of the gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CartPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance HoistPositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Encoder for measuring hoist position of the gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HoistPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance CartPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CartPositionSensor
]

instance HoistPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HoistPositionSensor
]

instance TrajectoryDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Logs of trajectory execution for historical analysis"
]

instance ValidationDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Metrics from continuous validation comparing measured vs simulated trajectories"
]

instance CraneStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data including crane position, swing angle, and wind speed"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CartPositionDataTransmitted, HoistPositionDataTransmitted, SwingAngleDataTransmitted, WindSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
]

instance TrajectoryExecutionLogsData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Logs of trajectory execution for historical analysis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TrajectoryDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
]

instance ValidationMetricsData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Metrics from continuous validation comparing measured vs simulated trajectories"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ValidationDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD model of the gantry crane created using Autodesk Fusion 360"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Fusion360Enabler
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model for trajectory generation of the gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GantrylibEnabler
]

instance SimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulation model for virtual execution of crane movements"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DockerEnabler
]

instance DockerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Docker containerization for simulation and service deployment"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeSimulationService, DataVisualizationService
]

instance TimescaleDBEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB for time-series data storage"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance GrafanaEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Grafana visualization tool for real-time dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

instance MQTTBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker for communication between physical and digital components"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService, DataVisualizationService
]

instance GantrylibEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python gantrylib module for kinematic calculations and trajectory generation"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService
]

instance ArduinoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Arduino controller for hardware control of stepper motors and electromagnet"
    DTDFVocab:enables PhysicalControlService
]

instance Fusion360Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Autodesk Fusion 360 for CAD modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables CADModel
]

instance CapellaEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Capella for Arcadia modeling and system evolution"
    DTDFVocab:enables SystemEvolutionService
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates optimal trajectories for crane movement using kinematic models"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryAction
]

instance RealTimeSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulates crane movements in real-time for virtual execution"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeStatusMonitoring
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visualizes crane data and system status using Grafana dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides DashboardAlerts, RealTimeStatusMonitoring
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Compares measured vs simulated trajectories for continuous validation"
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationAlerts
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Logs historical crane state and trajectory data to TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]

instance PhysicalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Executes control commands on physical components"
    DTDFVocab:provides MoveCartAction, MoveHoistAction, ActivateElectromagnetAction
]

instance SystemEvolutionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Manages system evolution using DarTwin notation and Arcadia models"
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemEvolutionInsight
]

instance DashboardAlerts : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Alerts triggered when validation metrics exceed predefined thresholds"
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory generation for crane control decisions"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance RealTimeStatusMonitoring : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of crane status for operational adjustments"
]

instance ValidationAlerts : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Alerts from continuous validation comparing measured and simulated trajectories"
]

instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical data for analysis and trend monitoring"
]

instance MoveCartAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Movement command for cart motor control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance MoveHoistAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Movement command for hoist motor control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ActivateElectromagnetAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Activation command for electromagnet"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SystemEvolutionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "System evolution insights for publications and teaching contexts"
]

instance CartStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor for cart movement"
]

instance HoistStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor for hoist movement"
]

instance CartMotorController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "TMC4671-Eval motor controller for cart movement"
]

instance HoistMotorController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "TMC4671-Eval motor controller for hoist movement"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet for container pickup"
]

instance CraneFrame : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Structural frame of the lab-scale gantry crane"
]

instance ArduinoController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Arduino controller for managing physical system operations"
]

instance PowerSupplyUnit : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power supply unit for the gantry crane system"
]

instance GantryCraneEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains CartStepperMotor, HoistStepperMotor, CartMotorController, HoistMotorController, Electromagnet, SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer, CartPositionSensor, HoistPositionSensor, ArduinoController, PowerSupplyUnit, CraneFrame
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands generated by the Trajectory Generator Service and Control Application are transmitted via the Physical Crane Interface to the motors and electromagnet for precise movement execution."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real-time synchronization; data logging and validation occur in real-time with no specified sampling rate but described as 'continuous' for monitoring and validation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Centralized architecture integrating physical components (crane, interface, control app, logging, HMI) with digital services (DB, dashboard, trajectory gen, simulation, validation) connected via MQTT broker, all deployed on a single PC with Docker-managed services."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers 'as designed' (CAD models in Autodesk Fusion 360) and 'as operated' (real-time data during crane operation), with evolution tracked via DarTwin notation for lifecycle management."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous Validation Service calculates distance metrics between measured and simulated trajectory data; thresholds determine validity, with breaches triggering operator notifications via dashboard."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for inter-service communication; Physical Crane Interface uses Python to communicate with hardware controllers (specific protocol not detailed in document)."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Deployed on a personal computer; Database, MQTT Broker, and Dashboard containers managed via Docker Compose; gantrylib Python module installed via pip for application logic."
]
